groups.group_name: Ensure MFA is enabled for the root account
groups.rationale: Split from: Multi-Factor Authentication Not Enabled for Accounts

groups.group_name: Ensure MFA is enabled for all IAM users with console access
groups.rationale: Split from: Multi-Factor Authentication Not Enabled for Accounts

groups.group_name: Resources Exposed to the Public Internet
groups.rationale: These findings share a common attack vector of unrestricted public exposure of resources to the internet.
These findings share the common remediation theme of enabling and retaining audit, configuration, and network visibility services for security monitoring.

groups.group_name: Ensure IAM password policy requires at least one lowercase letter
groups.rationale: Split from: Weak IAM Credential Hygiene Policies

groups.group_name: Ensure IAM user access keys are rotated every 90 days or less
groups.rationale: Split from: Weak IAM Credential Hygiene Policies
